'''âr-p-h-b''' ('''karapheboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacate|vacate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-p-h-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacate|vacate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-p-h-b
|-
! Lemma
| karapheboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirapheboko|thirapheboko]] || [[word:jirapheboko|jirapheboko]] || [[word:shirapheboko|shirapheboko]] || [[word:kirapheboko|kirapheboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurapheboko|thuthurapheboko]] || [[word:jujurapheboko|jujurapheboko]] || [[word:shushurapheboko|shushurapheboko]] || [[word:kukurapheboko|kukurapheboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurapheboko|thurapheboko]] || [[word:jurapheboko|jurapheboko]] || [[word:shurapheboko|shurapheboko]] || [[word:kurapheboko|kurapheboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurapheboko|thurapheboko]] || [[word:jurapheboko|jurapheboko]] || [[word:shurapheboko|shurapheboko]] || [[word:kurapheboko|kurapheboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therapheboko|therapheboko]] || [[word:jerapheboko|jerapheboko]] || [[word:sherapheboko|sherapheboko]] || [[word:kerapheboko|kerapheboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorapheboko|thothorapheboko]] || [[word:jojorapheboko|jojorapheboko]] || [[word:shoshorapheboko|shoshorapheboko]] || [[word:kokorapheboko|kokorapheboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorapheboko|thorapheboko]] || [[word:jorapheboko|jorapheboko]] || [[word:shorapheboko|shorapheboko]] || [[word:korapheboko|korapheboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorapheboko|thorapheboko]] || [[word:jorapheboko|jorapheboko]] || [[word:shorapheboko|shorapheboko]] || [[word:korapheboko|korapheboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrapheboko|thĂŠrapheboko]] || [[word:jĂŠrapheboko|jĂŠrapheboko]] || [[word:shĂŠrapheboko|shĂŠrapheboko]] || [[word:kĂŠrapheboko|kĂŠrapheboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharapheboko|thatharapheboko]] || [[word:jajarapheboko|jajarapheboko]] || [[word:shasharapheboko|shasharapheboko]] || [[word:kakarapheboko|kakarapheboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharapheboko|tharapheboko]] || [[word:jarapheboko|jarapheboko]] || [[word:sharapheboko|sharapheboko]] || [[word:karapheboko|karapheboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharapheboko|tharapheboko]] || [[word:jarapheboko|jarapheboko]] || [[word:sharapheboko|sharapheboko]] || [[word:karapheboko|karapheboko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
